title: Willpower: The Muscle Behind Entrepreneurial Success
subtitle: 为何部分创业者更易成功

paragraphs.en: People often wonder why some entrepreneurs have greater success than others. Is it habits, connections, luck, work ethic or any other behavior? I believe the key to success is willpower. Willpower is the ability to control yourself. It is a strong determination that allows you to do something difficult. It is a behavior we are born with more than one we learn; however, it is possible to not only learn it, but also strengthen it with constant exercise.
paragraphs.zh: 人们常好奇为何有些企业家比其他人更成功。是习惯、人脉、运气、职业道德还是其他行为？我相信成功的关键是意志力。意志力是控制自己的能力，是一种让你能做困难之事的坚定决心。它更多是一种我们与生俱来的行为，而非后天习得；然而，它不仅可学，还能通过持续锻炼来增强。

paragraphs.en: Willpower is just like a muscle; to keep it strong you need to constantly exercise it. People with a great amount of willpower have the discipline to develop positive, successful habits. Even with an incredible amount of talent, without the discipline and motivation to create positive habits, it can be difficult to achieve success. Willpower and habits go hand in hand. It is critical to create good habits and take the actions necessary to stick to those habits day in and day out for greater success.
paragraphs.zh: 意志力就像肌肉，要保持强壮就需要不断锻炼。意志力强大的人有自律能力来培养积极、成功的习惯。即便拥有惊人天赋，若无自律和动力去培养积极习惯，也难以取得成功。意志力与习惯相辅相成。养成好习惯并采取必要行动日复一日坚持下去，对取得更大成功至关重要。

paragraphs.en: Almost half of our daily actions are part of our habits and not decisions, so once the correct habits are in place, you will automatically perform those tasks on a day-to-day basis. The best way to create and stick to a habit is to have strong motivation. It's easier to change your habits to lose weight if you have a health issue and you want to be around longer for your kids, or if your business is something you're passionate about. Having a valuable outcome associated with a habit will help you stick to that habit permanently.
paragraphs.zh: 我们近半的日常行为是习惯的一部分而非刻意决定，因此一旦养成正确习惯，你便会日复一日自动执行这些任务。养成并坚持习惯的最佳方式是拥有强大动力。若因健康问题想为孩子活得更久，或对事业充满热情，改变减肥习惯就会更容易。让习惯与有价值的结果相关联，将助你永久坚持该习惯。

paragraphs.en: The art of self-control is one that most successful individuals have mastered. Self-control enables you to avoid behaviors that don't contribute to your success and adopt those that do. Because there is a delayed satisfaction associated with self-control, it can be easy to get off track. However, if you work on sticking to those small positive habits one day at a time, it becomes easier to stay strong and achieve that delayed reward. Once a reward is achieved, it is much easier to continue sticking to your habits.
paragraphs.zh: 自我控制的艺术是大多数成功人士已掌握的技能。自我控制让你能避免无助于成功的行为，采纳有利的行为。由于自我控制关联的是延迟满足，很容易偏离正轨。然而，如果你一天一天坚持那些微小的积极习惯，保持坚定并获得延迟奖励就会变得更容易。一旦获得奖励，继续坚持习惯就容易多了。
